message:
feat: frictionless beads init workflow (cherry-picked from PR #1685)

Cherry-picked UX improvements from maphew init workflow PR:
- Better test issue detection with shared isTestIssue() helper
- Non-interactive stdin detection in doctor fix/validate (prevents CI hangs)
- Initialize last_import_time and version tracking during bd init
- Set default beads.role when interactive prompt is skipped
- Warn about missing git upstream at init time
- Remove stale --no-daemon from doctor fix commands
- Context-aware Claude Plugin suggestion (only in Claude Code)
- Actionable error hints for database not initialized via FatalErrorWithHint
- Compile test-prefix regex once at package level instead of per-call

Dropped from original PR: auto-commit during init (needs opt-out flag),
daemon_deprecated.go stubs, accidentally restored deleted files (queries.go,
dirty.go from pre-Dolt transition branch base), release playbook docs.

Co-authored-by: maphew <maphew@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -15,9 +15,9 @@ import (
 var ErrTestBinary = fmt.Errorf("running as test binary - cannot execute bd subcommands")
 
 func newBdCmd(bdBinary string, args ...string) *exec.Cmd {
-	fullArgs := append([]string{"--no-daemon"}, args...)
-	cmd := exec.Command(bdBinary, fullArgs...) // #nosec G204 -- bdBinary from validated executable path
-	cmd.Env = append(os.Environ(), "BEADS_NO_DAEMON=1")
+	// The daemon subsystem has been removed. No need for --no-daemon flag.
+	// See daemon_deprecated.go for context.
+	cmd := exec.Command(bdBinary, args...) // #nosec G204 -- bdBinary from validated executable path
 	return cmd
 }
